<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Math; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractFunctionReplaceMutator; class RoundToCeil extends AbstractFunctionReplaceMutator { public const SET = 'Math'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Replaces `round` function with `ceil` function.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = round(1.2); // [tl! remove] $a = ceil(1.2); // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function from(): string { return 'round'; } public static function to(): string { return 'ceil'; } }
